summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Digital Hypebeast website - all core features working correctly
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with navbar, hero section, and live counter (1,273 transactions)
Products section displays all 5 products (Mobile Legends, Free Fire, PUBG, Google Play, Steam)
Buy button opens checkout popup with correct product info and pricing
Checkout popup: user ID input field works correctly
Checkout popup: payment method selection (Bank/E-Wallet/QRIS) works
Checkout popup: submit triggers loading state then success state
Services section displays 3 services (Website, IT Consultation, UI/UX)
Why Choose Us section with 3 features and badges
Testimonials section with 3 reviews (Andi, Budi, Rina)
Payment Methods section displays Bank, E-Wallet, QRIS options
Recent Transactions table displays 5 fake transaction rows
About section content displays correctly
Contact section with Telegram button (@DigitalHypebeast)
Footer with menu links and copyright
Floating Telegram button visible and positioned correctly
Activity notification appears and rotates (visible in screenshot)
Navigation links work with smooth scroll
Mobile responsive layout with working mobile menu
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Indonesian language content throughout the site
Color scheme matches requirements (Navy #0B1F3A, Blue #1E90FF, White, Gray)
